system.powerDescription:
A thick, sour fog spreads out and covers a CAT+1 area around yourself. This fog has the following effects: 

• All mundane flames are instantly snuffed out. Electronic lights are dimmed to the point of barely glowing. 

• Organic objects begin to rot at a rapid rate, decaying into a dark sludge. 

• Entrances and exits to buildings are randomized, leaving through a door may have you appear outside a window or vice versa. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may easily modify the parameters of a roll whilst active.
